rulings.Case Title: DENNISON RAVEL ET AL VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion Motion For Order Transfering Case To Appropriate Court (Change Of Venue) [Ccp 392]
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Dec. 30, 2019 line 1. PLAINTIFF DENNISON RAVEL, JOSEPHINE RAVEL Notice Of Motion Motion For Order Transfering Case To Appropriate Court (Change Of Venue) [Ccp 392] is GRANTED. Plaintiff to pay transfer costs. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: BAY-LAGUNA CONDOMINIUM OWNERS' ASSOCIATION VS. MARILYN OREM ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Dec. 30, 2019 line 2. PLAINTIFF BAY-LAGUNA CONDOMINIUM OWNERS' ASSOCIATION Motion For Preliminary Injunction is OFF CALENDAR. No OSC Re: Preliminary Injunction has been sought/obtained. "An OSC must be used …if the party against whom the preliminary injunction is sought has not appeared in the action." CRC 3.1150(a). = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION VS. YI HUA LI ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Dec. 30, 2019 line 3. DEFENDANT YI LI MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR, Second Amended Complaint on file. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: CUI CHANG ZHAO VS. JOSE LOPEZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Dec. 30, 2019 line 4. DEFENDANT JOSE LOPEZ, LUZ PALACIOS Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons is GRANTED, subject to opposition. December 7, 2019 service is quashed. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: CURRY PARKWAY, L.P. VS. THEODORAS KOLIATSIS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: AMENDED MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT / Amended Notice Of Motion & Motion For Summary Judgment For Possession Only
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Dec. 30, 2019 line 5. PLAINTIFF CURRY PARKWAY, L.P. AMENDED MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT / Amended Notice Of Motion & Motion For Summary Judgment For Possession Only is GRANTED, subject to opposition.= (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: MARTHA SPRANDEL VS. JYL PORCH ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Dec. 30, 2019 line 6. DEFENDANT JYL PORCH DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently states a cause of action for unlawful detainer and is not uncertain. = (501/CFH)
